prompt: Create a high-resolution full-body shot of a young woman with normal hair, standing in front of a vibrant multi-color graffiti wall filled with layered street art textures and tags. She is posed mid-step walking past the wall while looking at the camera, creating a dynamic motion feel. She is wearing a cropped denim jacket, white fitted mini dress, and white sneakers. The massive mural behind her features an identical character in a bold manga art style with text ‘Fatima’, glowing orange flames, and abstract city elements. Cinematic lighting, urban fashion photography style, shot on 35mm lens, hyper-realistic textures contrasting with the vivid 2D art.
